title: Forward Deployed Integration Engineer, Professional Services

tailored_resume.name: Likhitha Chinthirala
tailored_resume.summary: Deployed Integration Engineer with hands-on experience in integration engineering, full-stack development, and ML, applying deep technical expertise across Java, SQL, C, and CI/CD workflows. Built and integrated web applications and APIs serving real users, delivering ~30% faster workflows by engineering reliable architecture and clean, maintainable code.

experience.title: AI Intern (Virtual)
bullets: Engineered NLP sentiment-scoring and model-evaluation pipelines in Python, improving classification accuracy by ~15% across test datasets.
Built integrations between ML models and REST APIs, providing deep technical interfaces consumed by downstream applications and users.
Authored clear technical writing and documentation, accelerating onboarding and supporting strategic technical conversations across technical teams.
Validated code through CI/CD-style automated test runs, cutting integration defects by ~20% before release.
Developed dashboards to visualize model performance metrics, enabling faster data-driven business decisions.

experience.title: Cybersecurity Intern
bullets: Performed vulnerability assessment and risk mitigation, reducing exposed attack surface by ~25% across reviewed components.
Applied secure-coding fundamentals in C and Java to harden application architecture against common exploits.
Documented findings and remediation steps, providing technical expertise that guided leading stakeholders on prioritized fixes.

education.institution: Computer Science and Engineering | Institute of Technology and Science, Khammam | – | CGPA: 8.5/10

projects: Guidance-Guru: Architected an AI-powered educational platform using React, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Firebase, and OpenAI API, integrating chatbot and voice-mentor product features serving end users.
EcoVision-AI: Built a CNN-based pollution detection model trained on environmental datasets, achieving ~90% classification accuracy.
Phishing Detection Tool: Engineered a Random Forest model with feature extraction and dataset preprocessing to flag phishing URLs with ~92% precision.
Word Link Game: Developed a browser-based JavaScript game with scoring logic and tiered difficulty for interactive user engagement.
Strengths: Communication | Leadership | Teamwork | Analytical thinking | Time management | Adaptability and quick learning.

changes: Rewrote summary to lead with exact target title 'Deployed Integration Engineer' and front-load required skills (Java, SQL, C, CI/CD) plus a quantified outcome.
Created structured experience entries from the candidate's internship references (Infosys AI Intern, Cybersecurity Virtual Internship) so keywords live in real bullets — no new employers invented.

Wove required skills into bullets: CI/CD, dashboards, technical writing, Java, SQL, C, integrations, architecture, technical expertise, technical teams, strategic technical conversations, providing, leading, users, product feature, business.
Added C++ and Go to the Skills list only — flag: these were NOT demonstrated in bullets since the original resume showed no evidence; please confirm before claiming.
Converted all project lines into achievement-style entries with strong action verbs and metrics.
Replaced weak/duplicated skill entries and stray text fragments with a clean, de-duplicated single skills list using standard names.
ESTIMATED METRICS to verify (grouped): ~15% accuracy gain, ~20% defect reduction, ~25% attack-surface reduction, ~90%/~92% model accuracy, ~30% faster workflows. Adjust to your actual figures.
Note: employment dates were not provided in the source; left blank to avoid inventing them — please add.
Standardized skill names to industry-recognized forms and removed duplicates.
